ModMetadata.Name: Glow Paint Probe
ModMetadata.Author: SixFive7
ModMetadata.Description:
[h1]Glow Paint Probe[/h1]
Throwaway probe plugin for the SprayPaintPlus glow-paint feature. Logs GameManager swatch Emissive-presence and camera bloom state at startup; F9 / F10 toggle the emissive flag on the Thing under the cursor and log the resulting renderer state. Not intended for publication. See Plans/GlowPaintProbe/PLAN.md for the full probe session.
ModMetadata.ChangeLog: v0.1.0: Initial probe - Logs every GameManager.CustomColors entry with Name and Normal/Emissive presence on OnPrefabsLoaded - Logs CameraController.Instance.CameraEffects[0].Bloom presence and enabled state - F9 applies SetCustomColor(index, emissive: true) on cursor target; F10 applies false - Logs ThingRenderer shader name, _EmissionColor value, _EMISSION keyword state post-call
ModMetadata.InGameDescription: Glow Paint Probe Throwaway probe plugin for SprayPaintPlus glow feasibility. Keys: - F9: make cursor target glow - F10: reset cursor target
